texts.t002: From a 1980 MK-family workshop to a 14-line entrance automation company serving 11+ cities — the SMARTIE story is written in steel, motors and uptime.
texts.t004: Dealer & service presence across Mumbai, Ahmedabad, Bangalore, Lucknow, Delhi, Jaipur, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Chandigarh, Surat.
